channel.title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
channel.description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

item.title: Pressure Index 59/100 (elevated)
item.description: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 59/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 9.5%.

item.title: The Guardian: Starmer says Farage ‘dodging questions’ about £5m gift from crypto billionaire - The Guardian
item.description: Starmer says Farage ‘dodging questions’ about £5m gift from crypto billionaire - The Guardian

item.title: ITVX: Starmer condemns 'disgraceful' violent protests over Henry Nowak murder - ITVX

item.title: BBC Politics: Victims of Jeffrey Epstein ignored by government, says former minister

item.description: The real reason Farage has seized on the murder of Henry Nowak

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): UK politics: Hampshire chief constable says his force ‘sorry for handcuffing and arresting’ Henry Nowak – as it happened
